iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. DETERRENT. No nuclear dimension. DNI confirms enrichment 'obliterated'. Nuclear doctrine unchanged. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. IMMINENT. UK authorizes US use of British bases for Hormuz strikes. IRGC spokesman Naini killed (4th+ senior official). Kuwait refinery fires day 2. Iran missile launch rate DECLINING (depletion/rationing). $23B weapons bypass to Gulf allies. Trump lashes NATO 'COWARDS'. Bessent plans to unsanction Iranian oil. Multiple Gulf states intercepting attacks today. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UK authorizes US use of British bases for Hormuz strikes
latest_news.text: UK approves US use of British bases for 'collective self-defence of the region' including defensive ops degrading Iranian missile sites targeting Hormuz ships. Not direct UK involvement but significant escalation of allied support.

latest_news.headline: IRGC spokesman Ali Mohammed Naini killed in Israeli strike
latest_news.text: Israel kills IRGC spokesman Ali Mohammed Naini. IRGC confirms death via state TV. Described as led 'cognitive war' against adversaries. Continues pattern of senior IRGC assassination.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait refinery fires continue day 2 — Mina al-Ahmadi burning again
latest_news.text: Kuwait Petroleum confirms drone attack caused fires at Mina al-Ahmadi refinery for second consecutive day. Sustained Iranian targeting of Gulf energy infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: Iran missile launch rate declining — analysts cite depletion/rationing
latest_news.text: Rate of Iranian ballistic missile launches declining since early March. Analysts point to depletion of launcher stores and strategic rationing. Possible early indicator of diminishing Iranian strike capacity.

latest_news.headline: Trump bypasses Congress for $23B weapons sale to UAE, Kuwait, Jordan
latest_news.text: Trump administration bypasses Congress to push $23B in weapons sales to UAE, Kuwait, Jordan. Second time during war. Massive arms flow to Gulf allies.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 86% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. IMMINENT. Eid al-Fitr celebrations overshadowed by ongoing war. IDF ground ops continue on multiple axes. Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut. Hezbollah destroys 6 Merkavas. 1,000+ killed in Lebanon. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 NATO Patriots at Incirlik. NATO rules out Article 5. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. DETERRENT. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. DETERRENT. Arms to Iran ongoing. No direct intervention. Russia exploiting US bandwidth. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. DETERRENT. No PLA activity. Trade talks mentioned. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 36% (up). Day 21 Hour 19 update. CRITICAL. Peace talks 'situational pause'. Russia readies new offensive. Deadliest day of 2026. Zelensky sends delegation to US. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 36% (stable). Day 21 Hour 19 update. CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. TTP 3-day truce active. No fighting. Post-Eid resumption expected. Updated 2026-03-20T19:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 21 Hour 19. ESCALATION: UK authorizes US use of British bases, Naini killed, $23B weapons bypass, Trump lashes NATO. DE-ESCALATION: Iran missile launch rate declining (depletion/rationing), Netanyahu says war 'ending faster', Bessent plans to unsanction Iranian oil, energy strikes halted at Trump request. MIXED — military ops intensifying with allied support growing, but Iranian strike capacity may be degrading. Key watch: post-Eid Pakistan-Afghanistan resumption, Russia exploiting distraction.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM warplanes 'hunting and killing' Iranian vessels in Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US warplanes and attack helicopters ramped up assaults on Iranian drones and naval vessels. Gen. Dan Caine: forces are 'hunting and killing' Iran's fast-attack watercraft in contested sea lanes. 16 minelayers already destroyed.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens 'world tourism sites' — broadens threat scope beyond energy
latest_news.text: Iran warns threats to 'world tourism sites' and says 'still building missiles'. Broadening target category beyond regional energy infrastructure to global soft targets.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: war 'ending faster than people think' — signals mixed
latest_news.text: 'This war ending a lot faster than people think. We are winning and Iran is being decimated.' But also says 'there has to be a ground component' — mixed signals on trajectory.

latest_news.headline: Hormuz traffic down 95% — BBC Verify analysis
latest_news.text: BBC Verify: just under 100 ships passed through Hormuz since March 1. Pre-war: 138 ships/day. Daily traffic down 95%. 21 confirmed attacks on merchant ships as of Mar 12.

latest_news.headline: Russia readies new offensive as Ukraine peace talks on pause
latest_news.text: With US-brokered peace talks paused due to Iran war, Putin expected to expand military gains via new offensives. Russia suffered deadliest day of 2026: 1,700+ troops lost.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 18:04 UTC) - IMMINENT: Iran conventional war at max. CENTCOM aggressively clearing Hormuz. Iran claims 'fraction of firepower' used — escalating threats. 1,444 dead in Iran, 204 children. UAE arrests Iran-linked terror network. Macron seeks UNSC framework for Hormuz. Bahrain intercepted 238 drones total. Peace talks paused across Ukraine. Eid ceasefire holding in Pakistan-Afghanistan through Mar 23. Updated 2026-03-20T18:04:00Z
